description: A high school physics teacher needs to digitize a handwritten draft of a 'Work and Energy' unit test into a professional exam paper in Apache OpenOffice Writer. Configure the document with 0.75-inch margins on all sides. Include a header with 'Westview Academy' (Centered, Bold, 14pt) and 'Physics 301 - Unit 3: Work and Energy' (Centered, 12pt), followed by a student details area for Name, Date, and Period. Populate the exam with the 4 questions from /home/ga/Documents/exam_draft.txt. For any math formula codes in the draft, create proper mathematical formula objects using the provided syntax. Insert the image /home/ga/Documents/roller_coaster.png under Question 3. Save the final document as /home/ga/Documents/Physics_Unit3_Exam.odt.
